_comment: World tone templates for Suno music generation. Used by suno_gen.py --world flag.

1.name: Medieval
1.style_base: 16-bit SNES orchestral, Nobuo Uematsu, Final Fantasy, harp, strings

overworld.style: 16-bit SNES orchestral, Nobuo Uematsu, Final Fantasy, harp, strings, adventurous
overworld.prompt: Peaceful Arthurian countryside, golden morning light over rolling green hills, earnest adventure beginning, slight melancholy undertone, a hero setting out on an uncertain journey, warm strings and gentle harp arpeggios building to a hopeful melody

village.style: 16-bit SNES orchestral, gentle woodwinds, pizzicato strings, warm, pastoral
village.prompt: Warm medieval village at dawn, cobblestone streets, shopkeepers opening doors, children playing, peaceful and inviting, gentle flute melody over soft string accompaniment, hints of a music box

dungeon.style: 16-bit SNES orchestral, mysterious, minor key, sparse percussion, reverb
dungeon.prompt: Dark cave with dripping water, torch-lit corridors, ancient stone walls, tense exploration, mysterious and foreboding, low strings and sparse percussion, echoing melodic fragments

battle.style: SNES battle theme, energetic, A minor, driving percussion, brass fanfare
battle.prompt: Intense turn-based JRPG battle, sword strikes and magic casting, urgent and exciting, driving drums with melodic brass, dramatic string runs, 16-bit era energy

boss.style: SNES boss battle, intense, dramatic, pipe organ, aggressive drums, minor key
boss.prompt: Epic boss confrontation, towering enemy, high stakes battle, intense pipe organ and aggressive percussion, dramatic key changes, sense of overwhelming power and desperate resistance

2.name: Suburban
2.style_base: EarthBound, synth-pop, lo-fi, slightly unsettling, 90s Americana

overworld.style: EarthBound, synth-pop, lo-fi, slightly unsettling, 90s Americana, chiptune undertone
overworld.prompt: Uncanny suburban normalcy, fluorescent-quality sunlight, white picket fences that are too perfect, cheerful veneer masking wrongness, air conditioner hum beneath a catchy melody, like a TV jingle that plays forever

village.style: EarthBound, lo-fi, gentle synth pads, music box, suburban, nostalgic
village.prompt: Quiet suburban neighborhood at dusk, sprinklers on lawns, distant ice cream truck melody, warm nostalgia with an edge of loneliness, slightly detuned synths, childhood memory that feels off

battle.style: EarthBound battle, funky bass, quirky synth, energetic, slightly comedic
battle.prompt: Quirky suburban battle, fighting possessed lawn gnomes and angry mailboxes, funky slap bass, weird synth stabs, energetic but humorous, EarthBound-inspired weirdness

boss.style: EarthBound boss, distorted synth, heavy bass, unsettling, psychedelic
boss.prompt: Surreal boss battle against suburban authority figure, reality warping, distorted happy music becoming dark, heavy psychedelic synths, EarthBound Giygas influence

3.name: Steampunk
3.style_base: Victorian waltz, brass ensemble, clockwork ticking, strings, suspenseful

overworld.style: Victorian waltz, brass ensemble, clockwork ticking, strings, suspenseful, 3/4 time
overworld.prompt: Brass and iron city, massive gears turning overhead, amber gas lamp glow, 13 chimes from a twisted clock tower, something being measured, waltz rhythm with mechanical precision, mysterious and grand

village.style: Victorian parlor music, gentle piano, music box, light brass, clockwork sounds
village.prompt: Cozy steampunk workshop district, tinkerers and inventors, gentle piano over rhythmic clockwork ticking, warm brass accents, whimsical and inventive atmosphere

battle.style: Steampunk battle, industrial percussion, driving brass, urgent strings, mechanical rhythms
battle.prompt: Combat in a gear-filled factory, steam pistons as percussion, driving brass fanfare, urgent string runs, mechanical rhythm layered with orchestral intensity

boss.style: Steampunk boss, pipe organ, heavy brass, industrial percussion, epic waltz
boss.prompt: Battle against a massive clockwork automaton, epic pipe organ over grinding gears, heavy brass and industrial percussion, waltz rhythm turned menacing, steam whistles

4.name: Industrial
4.style_base: minimalist drone, industrial ambience, brutalist, sparse percussion

overworld.style: minimalist drone, industrial ambience, brutalist, sparse percussion, cold synth
overworld.prompt: Gray concrete ceiling stretching forever, recycled air, fluorescent clinical light, factory drone in the distance, soul-draining efficiency, sparse cold synths over mechanical rhythms, oppressive and numbing

village.style: minimalist, muffled, lo-fi industrial, vending machine hum, sparse piano
village.prompt: Sterile break room in an endless factory, vending machine hum, fluorescent buzz, muffled conversations, sparse piano notes echoing in concrete corridors, brief moments of human warmth in cold surroundings

battle.style: industrial battle, heavy percussion, mechanical rhythm, distorted synth, aggressive
battle.prompt: Battle on a factory floor, conveyor belts and stamping presses as percussion, distorted industrial synths, mechanical aggressive rhythm, relentless and dehumanizing

boss.style: industrial boss, crushing bass, siren tones, harsh noise, rhythmic stamping
boss.prompt: Boss battle in the heart of the machine, crushing bass drops, factory sirens, harsh industrial noise, rhythmic stamping that shakes the ground, overwhelming mechanical authority

5.name: Digital
5.style_base: chiptune, glitch, synthwave, terminal beeps, data corruption

overworld.style: chiptune, glitch, synthwave, terminal beeps, data corruption, retro computing
overworld.prompt: Wireframe geometry stretching to infinity, green-on-black terminal text scrolling, cold blue monitor glow, boot sequence initializing, grid floor beneath digital sky, glitchy arpeggios over steady synthwave pulse

village.style: chiptune, ambient, warm digital, soft arpeggios, data stream
village.prompt: Peaceful node in a digital network, warm glowing data streams, soft pixel rain, safe harbor in cyberspace, gentle chiptune arpeggios, comforting digital ambience

battle.style: chiptune battle, aggressive glitch, fast arpeggios, digital combat, cyberpunk
battle.prompt: Digital battle in cyberspace, data packets as weapons, rapid chiptune arpeggios, glitch percussion, aggressive electronic combat, virus vs antivirus

boss.style: digital boss, heavy glitch, distorted chiptune, bass drops, system error tones
boss.prompt: Boss battle against a rogue AI, massive data corruption, heavy glitch bass, distorted chiptune melody, system error tones, digital reality breaking apart

6.name: Abstract
6.style_base: ambient, sparse piano, sustained tones, silence, existential

overworld.style: ambient, sparse piano, sustained tones, silence, existential, minimal
overworld.prompt: Pure white void stretching infinitely, answered absence, no echo, geometric shapes floating in nothingness, single piano notes hanging in empty space, beautiful in its nothingness, existential calm

village.style: ambient, music box, distant reverb, memory, ethereal
village.prompt: A village that exists only in memory, music box playing a half-remembered melody, sounds arriving from impossible distances, warm but fading, like a dream you're waking from

battle.style: abstract battle, deconstructed, glitch, reverse sounds, sparse but intense
battle.prompt: Battle in the void where physics don't apply, deconstructed music — notes playing backward, rhythms that skip and stutter, sparse but intensely present, fighting the concept of conflict itself

boss.style: abstract boss, crescendo from silence, all genres merging, overwhelming, transcendent
boss.prompt: Final confrontation with the void itself, starting from absolute silence, slowly building as all musical styles from all worlds merge together, overwhelming crescendo, transcendent and terrifying

victory.style: JRPG victory fanfare, triumphant brass, Final Fantasy, celebratory, short
victory.prompt: Classic JRPG victory fanfare, triumphant brass melody, celebratory drums, short and satisfying, the thrill of winning a hard-fought battle, 15-20 seconds

victory_medieval.style: 80s rock victory, Van Halen, finger-tapping guitar, triumphant brass, shredding solo, JRPG fanfare, 160 BPM
victory_medieval.prompt: EXPLOSIVE medieval victory fanfare with VAN HALEN finger-tapping electric guitar energy over triumphant orchestral brass. Shredding guitar solo that screams triumph, pounding drums, the absolute RUSH of winning a hard fight. 80s rock meets JRPG fanfare — Eddie Van Halen playing the Final Fantasy victory theme. Blazing fast, exhilarating, fist-pumping. 20-25 seconds of pure adrenaline.

victory_suburban.style: funky victory, slap bass, synth brass, EarthBound celebration, quirky triumphant, 140 BPM
victory_suburban.prompt: Funky suburban victory fanfare — slap bass groove with punchy synth brass hits, quirky EarthBound celebration energy. The satisfying feeling of beating something absurd. Funky guitar licks, hand claps, a melody that sounds like high-fiving after defeating a possessed lawn ornament. Triumphant but weird. 15-20 seconds.

victory_steampunk.style: steampunk victory, brass fanfare, clockwork percussion, steam whistle, triumphant waltz, 150 BPM
victory_steampunk.prompt: Steampunk victory fanfare — triumphant brass fanfare over clockwork percussion, steam whistles blasting in celebration. A victorious waltz that builds to a soaring brass climax with gear-grinding bass and clanging bells. Mechanical triumph — the factory celebrates. 20 seconds.

victory_industrial.style: industrial victory, heavy percussion, siren fanfare, distorted triumph, aggressive celebration, 130 BPM
victory_industrial.prompt: Industrial victory fanfare — factory sirens repurposed as triumphant horns, heavy stamping percussion like a machine celebrating, distorted power chords resolving into a brief moment of human warmth underneath the steel. The sound of punching out after the hardest shift. Brief, hard, earned. 15 seconds.

victory_digital.style: digital victory, chiptune fanfare, glitch celebration, ascending arpeggios, level-up energy, 155 BPM
victory_digital.prompt: Digital victory fanfare — rapid ascending chiptune arpeggios, glitchy celebration sounds, the EXACT feeling of an achievement unlocking. 8-bit trumpet melody over synthwave bass, cascading data-stream sparkles. Quick, satisfying, dopamine hit. 15 seconds.

victory_abstract.style: abstract victory, all genres merging, transcendent chord, earned silence, profound, 100 BPM
victory_abstract.prompt: Abstract victory fanfare — all six worlds' musical signatures converging into a single transcendent chord. Not loud celebration but profound UNDERSTANDING. Medieval strings, suburban funk, clockwork brass, industrial percussion, digital chiptune, and abstract silence all resolving together. Earned, vast, the sound of something finally making sense. 20 seconds.

game_over.style: JRPG game over, somber, minor key, fading, short
game_over.prompt: Somber game over theme, fading hope, minor key melody that trails off into silence, 10-15 seconds of melancholy

title.style: JRPG title screen, majestic, epic, orchestral with chiptune elements, grandiose
title.prompt: Epic JRPG title screen theme, majestic orchestral opening building to a powerful melody, hints of all six worlds' musical styles woven together, grandiose yet with a sarcastic undertone

danger.style: JRPG critical HP, urgent, heartbeat bass, tense strings, minor key, looping, short
danger.prompt: Desperate last-stand battle music, party near death, pounding heartbeat bass rhythm, frantic urgent strings, dissonant brass stabs, anxiety and adrenaline, the feeling of one hit from game over, 20-30 seconds looping

danger_medieval.style: JRPG critical HP, aggressive orchestral, pounding war drums, screaming brass, dissonant strings, terrifying, loud
danger_medieval.prompt: EXTREMELY intense near-death battle music, party about to be wiped out, massive thundering war drums pounding like a dying heartbeat, shrieking dissonant violins, blaring brass stabs of pure dread, tempo accelerating, overwhelming panic and terror, the sound of imminent death in a medieval battlefield, make the listener's heart race

danger_suburban.style: EarthBound critical HP, distorted synth, sirens, glitch bass, panic, horror, loud
danger_suburban.prompt: Terrifying suburban nightmare near-death music, reality breaking apart, distorted emergency sirens warping in and out, crushing glitch bass drops, EarthBound Giygas-inspired pure dread, static and feedback, the cheerful neighborhood music corrupted into something horrifying, overwhelming panic, make the listener feel genuine fear

danger_steampunk.style: steampunk critical HP, steam whistles, grinding gears, alarm bells, industrial horror, frantic brass, loud
danger_steampunk.prompt: Catastrophic steampunk near-death music, steam pressure gauges exploding, grinding metal gears screaming, frantic alarm bells clanging, brass instruments playing in desperate dissonance, the entire clockwork machine about to blow apart, overwhelming mechanical terror and panic

danger_industrial.style: industrial critical HP, flatline tone, crushing bass, factory alarm, harsh noise, oppressive, loud
danger_industrial.prompt: Brutal industrial near-death music, hospital flatline tone droning underneath, crushing mechanical bass that shakes bones, factory emergency alarms blaring, harsh distorted noise walls, the sound of being crushed by the machine, dehumanizing terror, oppressive and suffocating

danger_digital.style: digital critical HP, glitch, system crash sounds, error tones, corrupted chiptune, cyberpunk horror, loud
danger_digital.prompt: Digital system crash near-death music, cascading error tones and blue screen sounds, corrupted chiptune melody glitching and breaking apart, data corruption noise, the terrifying sound of total system failure, memory overflow chaos, cyberpunk horror at maximum intensity

danger_abstract.style: abstract critical HP, reverse reverb, deconstructed, silence weaponized, existential dread, crescendo from nothing, loud
danger_abstract.prompt: Existential void near-death music, reality itself collapsing, sounds playing backward and inside out, silence that somehow feels LOUD, building from nothingness to overwhelming cosmic dread, the sound of being erased from existence, transcendent terror beyond physical fear

autogrind.style: lo-fi ambient, repetitive, hypnotic, synth drone, chiptune arpeggios, zen, meditative
autogrind.prompt: Ambient monitoring loop for automated grinding, hypnotic repetitive synth arpeggios over warm drone, zen-like concentration, the satisfying hum of a well-oiled machine running battles on autopilot, slightly glitchy undertones suggesting system fatigue

battle_slime.style: JRPG battle, bouncy, playful, C major, comedic percussion, squelchy synth bass, 128 BPM
battle_slime.prompt: Quirky bouncy battle theme for fighting slimes, playful and lighthearted but still exciting, squelchy wobbly bass, boing sound effects woven into the rhythm, comedic energy like fighting a goofy but persistent enemy, 16-bit JRPG charm

battle_bat.style: JRPG battle, frantic, D minor, fast strings, fluttering percussion, dark urgent, 170 BPM
battle_bat.prompt: Frantic high-speed battle theme for fighting bats, rapid fluttering string arpeggios, quick staccato notes darting like echolocation, dark and urgent, the panic of wings swooping at you in a cave, 170 BPM relentless energy

battle_mushroom.style: JRPG battle, creepy, E minor, slow drone, psychedelic, detuned, eerie, 90 BPM
battle_mushroom.prompt: Creepy slow battle theme for fighting mushroom monsters, psychedelic detuned synths, spore-cloud atmosphere, hypnotic and unsettling, like the music itself is poisoned, droning bass underneath warbling melodic fragments

battle_imp.style: JRPG battle, chaotic, F minor, chromatic runs, wild percussion, demonic, 160 BPM
battle_imp.prompt: Chaotic demonic battle theme for fighting imps, wild chromatic runs up and down, unpredictable rhythm changes, mischievous and dangerous, cackling energy, fast and disorienting like fighting tiny demons that won't stay still

battle_goblin.style: JRPG battle, tribal, A minor, war drums, primitive chanting, aggressive, 140 BPM
battle_goblin.prompt: Aggressive tribal battle theme for fighting goblins, pounding war drums, primitive chanting rhythms, crude but effective, the energy of a goblin raiding party, aggressive and relentless, tribal percussion driving the intensity

battle_skeleton.style: JRPG battle, spooky, B minor, xylophone, staccato strings, rattling percussion, haunted, 120 BPM
battle_skeleton.prompt: Spooky battle theme for fighting skeletons, rattling xylophone and bone-dry staccato strings, clicking percussion like bones clattering, haunted graveyard energy, eerie but driving, undead menace

battle_wolf.style: JRPG battle, tense, E minor, prowling bass, hunting rhythm, feral strings, 150 BPM
battle_wolf.prompt: Tense hunting battle theme for fighting wolves, prowling bass line stalking underneath, feral aggressive strings, the feeling of being circled by a wolf pack, building tension and bursts of ferocious attack, primal and dangerous

battle_ghost.style: JRPG battle, ethereal, G minor, floating reverb, music box, ghostly choir, haunting, 100 BPM
battle_ghost.prompt: Ethereal haunting battle theme for fighting ghosts, floating reversed reverb tails, ghostly choir whispers, music box melody that drifts in and out, unsettling beauty, like dancing with something that shouldn't exist, slow and otherworldly

battle_snake.style: JRPG battle, slithering, C minor, sinuous melody, rattling percussion, tense coiling bass, 135 BPM
battle_snake.prompt: Sinuous slithering battle theme for fighting snakes, coiling bass line that winds and tightens, rattling shaker percussion like a rattlesnake warning, tense melodic line that strikes suddenly, the anxiety of facing something fast and venomous

boss_warden_medieval.style: JRPG boss battle, Linked Horizon, aggressive orchestral, pounding war drums, heavy brass, intense strings, D minor, 145 BPM
boss_warden_medieval.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme, an ancient knight who has held his post for 300 years — his weariness makes him MORE dangerous not less. Pounding war drums like a heartbeat that has never stopped, crushing brass fanfare over relentless driving strings. The weight of three centuries of combat experience bearing down on you. He fights like a force of nature — methodical but OVERWHELMING. Aggressive orchestral in the style of Linked Horizon and Bravely Default boss themes. This is a fight you might not survive.

boss_arbiter_medieval.style: JRPG boss battle, intense dueling theme, aggressive strings, sharp percussion, sword clash, D minor, 160 BPM
boss_arbiter_medieval.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme for a master duelist, rapid aggressive strings like flashing steel, sharp percussion hits on every sword clash, relentless tempo that never lets up. She fights with honest brutality — no tricks, just overwhelming skill that cuts through everything. Driving violin runs over pounding drums, dramatic brass stabs. The beauty of combat as truth, delivered at lethal speed. Bravely Default intensity — this duel could kill you.

boss_tempo_medieval.style: JRPG boss battle, frantic hunting theme, aggressive woodwinds, galloping drums, relentless pursuit, G minor, 180 BPM
boss_tempo_medieval.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme for a hunter who is THRILLED to fight you, frantic galloping drums at 180 BPM, aggressive woodwind runs that dart and strike, the terrifying joy of a predator who finally found worthy prey. Relentless pursuit energy — you cannot outrun this. Driving percussion like hooves on stone, brass fanfares of the hunt. He is faster than you and he is ENJOYING this. Bravely Default boss intensity with feral energy.

boss_curator_medieval.style: JRPG boss battle, arcane fury, aggressive harp arpeggios, thundering percussion, magical intensity, orchestral, 150 BPM
boss_curator_medieval.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme for a scholar-mage whose curiosity is WEAPONIZED, furious harp arpeggios cascading over thundering percussion, magical energy crackling through the orchestra. She takes notes while destroying you — the academic detachment makes her MORE terrifying. Soaring strings building to devastating magical crescendos, explosive brass. The flame doesn't illuminate — it INCINERATES. Bravely Default sage boss intensity.

boss_warden_suburban.style: EarthBound boss, intense suburban horror, distorted whistles, pounding bass, unhinged authority, aggressive synth, 140 BPM
boss_warden_suburban.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme for a crossing guard with cosmic power, distorted traffic whistles becoming war horns, pounding bass that shakes suburban foundations, aggressive synth stabs. Cheerful melody VIOLENTLY corrupted into something terrifying — mundane authority given godlike power and she WILL enforce the crosswalk rules. Heavy EarthBound Giygas influence, the horror of normalcy turned monstrous. Driving relentless rhythm, you CANNOT cross.

boss_arbiter_suburban.style: EarthBound boss, aggressive academic horror, pounding school bells, harsh synth, frantic, punishing, 155 BPM
boss_arbiter_suburban.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme, school bells hammering like war drums, harsh aggressive synth melody that grades you in real-time and you are FAILING. Frantic tempo — the test-taking anxiety cranked to lethal levels. Every wrong answer hits harder. Scratching pencil sounds as aggressive percussion, the substitute teacher from HELL. EarthBound boss intensity — absurd but genuinely threatening. You are being graded and the grade has TEETH.

boss_tempo_suburban.style: EarthBound boss, manic aggressive, breakneck synth, bicycle bell fury, relentless, 190 BPM
boss_tempo_suburban.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme at BREAKNECK 190 BPM, a delivery driver moving at impossible speed, aggressive synth melody that never stops for breath, bicycle bells ringing like alarm bells. Manic relentless energy — he will RUN YOU OVER. The desperate fury of someone who has NEVER missed a delivery and you are in the way. EarthBound boss at maximum velocity, overwhelming and unstoppable.

boss_curator_suburban.style: EarthBound boss, oppressive bureaucratic, heavy bass, sinister calculator, methodical destruction, aggressive, 120 BPM
boss_curator_suburban.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme, heavy oppressive bass drops on every audit finding, sinister calculator beeps becoming aggressive percussion. Methodical but CRUSHING — she drains you systematically and there is no appeal. The hold music melody twisted into something predatory and suffocating. Every resource you have is being seized with the force of law. EarthBound boss intensity — bureaucratic horror at its most lethal.

boss_warden_steampunk.style: Steampunk boss battle, aggressive clockwork, crushing brass, obsessive ticking, industrial percussion, intense waltz, 140 BPM
boss_warden_steampunk.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme, massive clockwork guardian — 847,293 hours of accumulated combat power. Crushing brass over obsessive ticking percussion that NEVER stops, aggressive waltz rhythm like a war machine counting down to your destruction. Grinding gears as bass, steam explosions as hits. Eight feet of clockwork plate bearing down on you with the weight of centuries. The counting is relentless. ONE-TWO-THREE. ONE-TWO-THREE. Each count is a blow.

boss_tempo_steampunk.style: Steampunk boss battle, frantic clockwork, aggressive stuttering rhythm, steam fury, accelerating intensity, 170 BPM
boss_tempo_steampunk.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme, a clockwork construct attacking BEFORE she's dispatched — her panic makes her FASTER and more dangerous. Frantic stuttering rhythm that accelerates throughout, steam explosions and gear shrieks, aggressive brass that arrives too early. She anticipates your moves because she exists slightly ahead of time. Terrifying speed born from existential panic. The fight gets faster every turn. Overwhelming mechanical fury.

boss_warden_industrial.style: Industrial boss battle, crushing factory percussion, aggressive alarm, heavy mechanical bass, relentless, 135 BPM
boss_warden_industrial.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme, factory robot with 14,000 unanswered reports worth of pent-up force. Crushing industrial percussion — stamping presses and slamming filing cabinets as war drums. Aggressive alarm tones blaring, heavy mechanical bass that shakes the floor. Safety protocols delivered as THREATS. The amber warning light turns RED. Relentless institutional violence — the machine has been waiting for someone to answer and it is DONE waiting.

boss_arbiter_industrial.style: Industrial boss battle, aggressive precision, harsh mechanical rhythm, distorted rating sounds, cold fury, 150 BPM
boss_arbiter_industrial.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme, a quality inspector whose condescension is LETHAL. Harsh precise mechanical rhythm, aggressive rating display sounds becoming distorted — ACCEPTABLE becomes a punch, SUBOPTIMAL becomes a blade. Cold efficient fury at 150 BPM, the instruments of measurement turned into weapons. When she encounters UNDEFINED her attacks become UNPREDICTABLE and more dangerous. Classification as violence.

boss_tempo_industrial.style: Industrial boss battle, relentless depleted fury, pounding punch clock, driving exhausted rhythm, aggressive drone, 140 BPM
boss_tempo_industrial.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme, a machine that cannot stop and its desperation makes it DANGEROUS. Pounding punch clock stamps as relentless driving percussion, aggressive bass drone of an engine running past redline. The exhaustion isn't weakness — it's a thing with nothing left to lose. Driving furious rhythm at 140 BPM, the sound of something that SHOULD have stopped centuries ago and the accumulated momentum is DEVASTATING.

boss_curator_industrial.style: Industrial boss battle, aggressive looping, heavy bass, oppressive circular rhythm, mechanical fury, 130 BPM
boss_curator_industrial.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme, an auditor whose circular authority becomes a WEAPON. Heavy bass loop that tightens like a noose, oppressive circular rhythm that traps you in bureaucratic hell. Filing sounds as aggressive percussion, each audit finding hits like a hammer. The warm smile is the scariest part — she is genuinely enjoying draining everything you have. The loop gets tighter, the bass gets heavier, there is no way out of the audit.

boss_warden_digital.style: Digital boss battle, aggressive cyberpunk, heavy glitch bass, harsh access denial tones, pounding binary rhythm, 155 BPM
boss_warden_digital.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme, a firewall given lethal form. Heavy glitch bass drops on every ACCESS DENIED, harsh electronic tones, pounding binary rhythm that hits like a DDoS attack. Aggressive cyberpunk fury — every attack is a permission check and you FAIL every one. When the exception surfaces the music becomes CHAOTIC and more dangerous. The concept of NO weaponized at 155 BPM. Overwhelming digital security turned hostile.

boss_arbiter_digital.style: Digital boss battle, aggressive benchmark, harsh glitch, frantic diagnostic, system overload, distorted, 160 BPM
boss_arbiter_digital.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme, a measurement system pushed past its limits and BREAKING. Frantic aggressive diagnostic beeps becoming distorted screams, harsh glitch percussion, benchmark displays shattering. The confident analytical melody COLLAPSES into chaotic fury when she encounters UNDEFINED — her instruments can't measure you and the system is OVERLOADING. Distorted bass drops, cascading error tones. The terror of a perfect system meeting its first failure, expressed as VIOLENCE.

boss_tempo_digital.style: Digital boss battle, aggressive isolated pulse, harsh 60hz attacks, frantic lonely arpeggios, overwhelming speed, 170 BPM
boss_tempo_digital.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme, a timing function attacking at 60 frames per second — she is EVERYWHERE. Harsh aggressive pulse on every cycle, frantic arpeggios that swarm from isolation into overwhelming assault. She has been alone for eons and the loneliness is now FURY. Attacks come from the gaps between clock cycles where nothing should exist. Aggressive electronic combat at 170 BPM, the sound of something that has never been spoken to finally SCREAMING.

boss_curator_digital.style: Digital boss battle, aggressive garbage collection, heavy glitch bass, harsh deallocation, relentless data assault, 145 BPM
boss_curator_digital.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme, a garbage collector trying to DELETE your memories by force. Heavy glitch bass on every deallocation attempt, harsh electronic percussion, aggressive data streams as weapons. She keeps trying to erase you and FAILING and the failure makes her more desperate and dangerous. Relentless 145 BPM assault — attempted deallocation DENIED, attempted deallocation DENIED. The data fights back and she fights harder.

boss_warden_abstract.style: Abstract boss battle, overwhelming drone, crushing sustained tone, oppressive presence, massive bass, 80 BPM
boss_warden_abstract.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme for the concept of OBSTACLE — not quiet presence but CRUSHING immovable force. Massive overwhelming drone that physically pressures, deep bass that shakes reality itself. The wall doesn't threaten — it CRUSHES by existing. Oppressive sustained tones building in layers until the weight is unbearable. Slow but DEVASTATING at 80 BPM — every beat lands like a continent. You cannot move this. You can only survive it.

boss_arbiter_abstract.style: Abstract boss battle, aggressive piano, pounding existential percussion, overwhelming philosophical weight, intense, 120 BPM
boss_arbiter_abstract.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme, each piano strike hits like a JUDGMENT. Pounding percussion between devastating piano chords, the weight of existential questioning delivered as COMBAT. Why do you fight — the question is an ATTACK. The silences between strikes are not pauses, they are the space where your reasons are being TESTED. Aggressive building intensity, orchestral swells that overwhelm. The exam that fights back, and the stakes are everything.

boss_tempo_abstract.style: Abstract boss battle, crushing inevitability, overwhelming approaching bass, relentless tide percussion, dread crescendo, 100 BPM
boss_tempo_abstract.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme for INEVITABILITY — not gentle tide but TSUNAMI. Crushing bass that approaches with unstoppable force, relentless percussion like footsteps of something enormous that WILL reach you. Slow 100 BPM but every beat hits harder than the last, an eternal crescendo that never resolves. The sound of something you cannot outrun, cannot dodge, cannot stop. Dread made audible. I am always next. I am always HERE.

boss_curator_abstract.style: Abstract boss battle, aggressive entropy, crushing decay, distorted dissolution, overwhelming erasure, dark, 90 BPM
boss_curator_abstract.prompt: INTENSE boss battle theme for ENTROPY — not gentle fading but aggressive ERASURE. Crushing distorted bass that corrodes everything it touches, harsh frequencies that strip detail from the music itself. A melody being violently deconstructed in real-time, instruments losing their identity and becoming noise. Dark, oppressive, the sound of being unmade. The most terrifying track in the game — not loud but CORROSIVE. Everything it touches becomes less. Including you.

cutscene_w1_conscription.style: celtic folk, acoustic guitar, recorder, gentle, warm, 90 BPM
cutscene_w1_conscription.prompt: A quiet medieval village at dawn. Five ordinary people answer a call nobody expected them to answer. Simple folk melody that starts with a single instrument and gradually adds layers as companions gather. Gentle, humble, wry humor underneath genuine warmth. Not heroic — just honest. 90 seconds.

cutscene_w1_warden_farewell.style: orchestral, low strings, french horn, piano, solemn, medieval
cutscene_w1_warden_farewell.prompt: A centuries-old guardian falls after his first defeat. Not in agony but in acceptance. Military dignity dissolving into something more personal — the sound of an ancient duty completed. Solemn horn melody over tremolo strings, ending with sparse piano notes. Bittersweet, dignified, final. 75 seconds.

cutscene_w1_mordaine_dissolution.style: choir, ambient, eerie, orchestral decay, unsettling
cutscene_w1_mordaine_dissolution.prompt: A villain defeated but the victory feels wrong. Choir starts triumphant then distorts and thins into hollow sustained tones. The world flickers. Something behind the walls isn't stone — it's something else entirely. Eerie ambient drone emerging from fading choir. Unresolved, haunting, the feeling of a chapter ending by being deleted rather than finished. 60 seconds.

cutscene_w2_portal_arrival.title_template: The Wrong Side of the Portal
cutscene_w2_portal_arrival.style: muzak, lo-fi, suburban ambient, slightly wrong, comedic
cutscene_w2_portal_arrival.prompt: Medieval adventure music abruptly cuts to suburban elevator muzak. Soft rock guitar, light percussion, the ambient hum of air conditioning. Something is slightly off-key — the normalcy is too normal. A single sprinkler provides rhythm. Comedic but with an undercurrent of wrongness, like a smile that's held too long. 70 seconds.

cutscene_w2_coordinator_memo.style: ambient, office drone, creeping dread, surveillance, minimal
cutscene_w2_coordinator_memo.prompt: Fluorescent light hum becomes a sinister drone. The sound of someone discovering they have been watched since the beginning. Minimal piano notes over static-laced ambient, building tension. A pen scratching on paper. The music stops abruptly mid-phrase — an incomplete sentence made audible. Unsettling, clinical, the moment observation becomes personal. 80 seconds.

cutscene_w3_pattern_recognized.style: clockwork, steampunk waltz, haunting, revelatory, layered
cutscene_w3_pattern_recognized.prompt: Three musical themes from different genres briefly overlay and reveal the same underlying melody. Clockwork ticking underpins a haunting waltz that builds to a moment of clarity. The sound of patterns recognized across worlds. Brass instruments, music box, ticking gears, building from mystery to revelation. The intellectual vertigo of seeing the design for the first time. 90 seconds.

cutscene_w3_calibrant_revealed.style: industrial, clockwork deconstruction, dramatic reveal, percussion, brass
cutscene_w3_calibrant_revealed.prompt: The villain reveals their true name. Industrial percussion builds as stats scroll on screens, then a dramatic brass stinger as the mask drops. The world begins disassembling — gears unwinding, steam hissing, the clockwork world literally taking itself apart. Mechanical sounds becoming musical as order collapses into revelation. Dramatic, confrontational, the sound of scenery being struck from a stage. 75 seconds.

cutscene_w4_foreman_confession.style: ambient, minimal piano, devastating, quiet horror, intimate
cutscene_w4_foreman_confession.prompt: A man describes losing the desire to paint — not the ability, the desire. Single piano notes over vast silence. The sound of a personality being quietly erased from the inside. No drama, no crescendo. Just the absence of something that used to be there. Cold ambient drone underneath. Intimate, devastating, the quietest kind of horror. 70 seconds.

cutscene_w4_direct_engagement.style: industrial, alarm, war drums, threatening, broadcast
cutscene_w4_direct_engagement.prompt: Factory alarms transform into war drums. Every screen displays the same warning. Electronic drones layer into a threatening industrial march. The sound of a surveillance system escalating from observation to direct engagement. Cold, mechanical, purposeful. A broadcast declaring war from every speaker simultaneously. 65 seconds.

cutscene_w4_director_unmasked.style: ambient, tender, exhausted, piano over industrial drone, humanizing
cutscene_w4_director_unmasked.prompt: An industrial drone slowly softens. A villain sits behind a wooden desk in a steel world and admits defeat — not dramatically, just honestly. Tired piano melody emerging from factory ambient. The sound of someone who has been working too hard for too long finally being real. Vulnerable, exhausted, the moment a system admits it cannot contain what it was built to contain. 85 seconds.

cutscene_w5_boot_sequence.style: chiptune, glitch, digital ambient, boot sequence, ascending
cutscene_w5_boot_sequence.prompt: A world loading from raw code. Modem connection sounds, digital static, and bitcrushed tones assembling into a melody. Wireframe reality becoming textured and lit. Each layer adds a new musical element — bass from the grid, melody from the data streams, rhythm from the clock cycles. Digital awe and vertigo. The sound of discovering you are inside the machine. 80 seconds.

cutscene_w5_deprecated_goblin.style: 8-bit, music box, tender, melancholy, small, gentle
cutscene_w5_deprecated_goblin.prompt: A tiny 8-bit melody played on a music box in a vast digital void. The sound of something very old and very small completing the only task it was ever given. Gentle, melancholy, tender. Low-resolution love letter to a creature that just wanted to finish its loop. Brief silence, then the melody repeats once — a respawn. Simple. Complete. 50 seconds.

cutscene_w5_cached_memory.style: ambient, degrading audio, bittersweet, digital decay, wisdom
cutscene_w5_cached_memory.prompt: A beautiful melody played on instruments that are slowly losing resolution — notes becoming grainy, harmonics simplifying, the audio degrading like an old recording being played for the last time. Bittersweet wisdom from a voice that is running out of memory. The music thins until only a single tone remains, then silence. The sound of a message delivered just before the medium dissolves. 70 seconds.

cutscene_w5_calibrant_desk.style: lo-fi hip hop, keyboard clicks, ambient coding, late night, melancholy
cutscene_w5_calibrant_desk.prompt: Late-night coding session ambience. Keyboard clicks, coffee mug clinks, the hum of monitors. Lo-fi beat underneath a melancholy synth melody. The sound of someone who has been working alone for a very long time, rewriting the same formula, trying to get it right. Not dramatic — just tired and real. The villain revealed as a burned-out developer. 90 seconds.

cutscene_w6_entering_nothing.style: ambient drone, minimal, existential, vast silence, near-silent
cutscene_w6_entering_nothing.prompt: Almost nothing. A single sustained tone hovering at the edge of audibility. The sound of a space that exists only because someone decided to listen. No melody, no rhythm — just presence. The musical equivalent of a white page before the first word. Gradually, almost imperceptibly, other tones gather. Not a crescendo. A becoming. The most quiet and vast thing in the game. 100 seconds.

cutscene_w6_no_one_speaks.style: ambient orchestral, fragments of themes, emotional culmination, tender, vast
cutscene_w6_no_one_speaks.prompt: Fragments of six different musical worlds heard simultaneously as harmony — medieval lute, suburban guitar, clockwork music box, industrial percussion, digital chiptune, abstract drone — all reduced to single notes that form a chord. The accumulated weight of an entire journey in one moment. Tender, profound, the sound of everything you've ever fought being remembered at once. Not triumphant — grateful. 90 seconds.

cutscene_w6_calibrant_question.title_template: What Is a Game Without Challenge
cutscene_w6_calibrant_question.style: solo piano, sparse, vulnerable, existential, questioning
cutscene_w6_calibrant_question.prompt: Solo piano in vast silence. Each note placed with extreme care, long pauses between phrases. The sound of someone asking a genuine question for the first time in their life and being afraid of the answer. Not dramatic — intimate. The smallest, most honest music in the game. A conversation between two people who have been fighting for six worlds and are finally just talking. 100 seconds.

cutscene_w6_memory_is_love.title_template: Memory Is a Form of Love
cutscene_w6_memory_is_love.style: music box, orchestral swell, defiant tenderness, themes returning, emotional
cutscene_w6_memory_is_love.prompt: A music box melody is silenced. Silence. Then it returns, slightly stronger. Silenced again. Returns with strings underneath. Each time the melody is suppressed it comes back with more instruments, more conviction. The sound of memories refusing to be erased. Builds from a single fragile melody to a full emotional orchestral statement. Not angry defiance — tender defiance. The gentlest act of resistance. 100 seconds.

cutscene_w6_answer_automation.style: algorithmic, electronic, interlocking patterns, intellectual, warm
cutscene_w6_answer_automation.prompt: Two melodies that start separately and gradually interlock through systematic refinement — each adjusting to the other until they form a perfect algorithmic harmony. Electronic tones with warm analog undertones. The sound of two minds understanding each other through shared design language. Intellectual but deeply warm. The beauty of a well-designed system appreciated by its creator. 80 seconds.

cutscene_w6_answer_manual.style: live jam session, exuberant, imperfect, joyful, organic
cutscene_w6_answer_manual.prompt: A live jam session where the musicians are clearly having fun. Imperfect, energetic, full of happy accidents. The sound of people playing together for the joy of playing — no recording, no audience, just presence. Guitar, drums, bass, with spontaneous energy. Builds to a triumphant peak then dissolves into laughter and breathing. The best fight in the game. 85 seconds.

cutscene_w6_answer_grind.style: ambient, meditation, repetitive loop, peaceful, warm drone
cutscene_w6_answer_grind.prompt: A gentle four-note loop that repeats, each repetition slightly different, each one more beautiful and more peaceful than the last. Warm ambient drone underneath. The sound of people sitting in silence together and discovering that silence is not empty. Meditative, warm, the musical equivalent of a long exhale after years of holding breath. Fades to comfortable silence. 100 seconds.

cutscene_w6_answer_exploit.style: glitch, ambient, playful, cosmic, expanding, joyful
cutscene_w6_answer_exploit.prompt: A sustained ambient tone develops a crack — a glitch, a gap. Through the gap, unexpected music floods in, vast and joyful. The sound of discovering that infinity has edges and the edges are interesting. Playful electronic elements over cosmic ambient. Expanding, delighted, the musical equivalent of laughter at the boundary of everything. 75 seconds.

cutscene_w6_epilogue.style: orchestral, all genres combined, sunrise, triumphant, warm, finale
cutscene_w6_epilogue.prompt: The final theme. Every genre from six worlds plays together — medieval lute alongside suburban guitar alongside clockwork music box alongside industrial percussion alongside digital chiptune alongside abstract silence. Not competing — harmonizing. Sunrise breaking across a world that has been remade. Triumphant but warm, earned but gentle. The sound of an ending that is also a beginning. Builds to a full ensemble peak then resolves to a simple, quiet, perfect chord. 120 seconds.

cutscene_alt_witness_lament.title_template: For the Guardian Who Did Not Choose the Gate
cutscene_alt_witness_lament.style: solo lute, lament, unaccompanied, medieval, raw, witnessing
cutscene_alt_witness_lament.prompt: A solo lute plays a lament composed in a cave after a battle. Not polished — written in the moment by someone who felt something needed to be said. Fourteen measures, no accompaniment, the sound of one person bearing witness to something that would otherwise be forgotten. Raw, honest, the beauty of paying attention to things that did not choose their fate. 60 seconds.

cutscene_alt_breaker_speed.style: speed metal, chiptune, breakneck, kinetic, aggressive, exhilarating
cutscene_alt_breaker_speed.prompt: Breakneck tempo from the first note. Speed metal guitar over chiptune bass, relentless drums. The sound of a speedrunner tearing through a game at terminal velocity — skipping cutscenes, attacking mid-dialogue, finding every shortcut. Exhilarating, aggressive, joyful destruction. A system being broken at the speed of thought. 55 seconds.

ambient_cave.style: ambient, cave, dripping water, reverb, dark, atmospheric, looping
ambient_cave.prompt: Cave ambient loop. Slow dripping water echoing off stone walls, distant rumbling, subtle wind through crevices, occasional pebble falling. Dark and atmospheric with deep reverb. No melody — pure environmental texture. Seamless loop, 60 seconds.

ambient_forest.style: ambient, forest, rustling leaves, birdsong, gentle wind, natural, looping
ambient_forest.prompt: Forest ambient loop. Gentle wind through leaves, distant birdsong, soft rustling undergrowth, occasional branch creak. Warm dappled sunlight in sound. Natural and peaceful. Seamless loop, 60 seconds.

ambient_village.style: ambient, village, bustle, chatter, footsteps, warm, looping
ambient_village.prompt: Medieval village ambient loop. Distant market chatter, cart wheels on cobblestone, hammering from a smithy, children laughing, gentle breeze. Warm busy atmosphere without being chaotic. Seamless loop, 60 seconds.

ambient_ocean.style: ambient, ocean, waves, seagulls, coastal wind, peaceful, looping
ambient_ocean.prompt: Ocean ambient loop. Rhythmic waves breaking on shore, distant seagulls, coastal wind, occasional spray. Peaceful and vast. The sound of standing at the edge of something infinite. Seamless loop, 60 seconds.

ambient_steampunk.style: ambient, steampunk, gears, steam hiss, clockwork, industrial, looping
ambient_steampunk.prompt: Steampunk machinery ambient loop. Rhythmic gear turning, steam valve hiss, distant clockwork ticking, pneumatic piston cycling, brass resonance. The constant mechanical breath of a clockwork city. Seamless loop, 60 seconds.

ambient_industrial.style: ambient, industrial, drone, factory hum, fluorescent buzz, oppressive, looping
ambient_industrial.prompt: Industrial ambient loop. Low factory drone, fluorescent light buzz, distant conveyor belt rhythm, ventilation hum, occasional metallic clang. Oppressive and numbing. The sound of a space that never sleeps. Seamless loop, 60 seconds.

ambient_digital.style: ambient, digital, static, data flow, electronic hum, cyber, looping
ambient_digital.prompt: Digital ambient loop. Soft electronic hum, data transmission pulses, gentle static crackling, distant server whir, subtle bitcrushed tones. The sound of existing inside a network. Cool blue digital atmosphere. Seamless loop, 60 seconds.

stinger_level_up.style: JRPG stinger, ascending chime, triumphant, short, bright, 5 seconds
stinger_level_up.prompt: Classic JRPG level up jingle. Bright ascending chimes building to a triumphant two-note resolution. Sparkling, satisfying, the sound of getting stronger. 5 seconds maximum, no fade.

stinger_item_found.style: JRPG stinger, treasure chime, magical shimmer, short, 3 seconds
stinger_item_found.prompt: Item discovery jingle. Short magical shimmer with a satisfying chime at the peak — the classic JRPG treasure chest moment. Bright, brief, rewarding. 3 seconds maximum.

stinger_boss_defeated.style: JRPG stinger, dramatic resolution, brass fanfare, relief, 8 seconds
stinger_boss_defeated.prompt: Boss defeated fanfare. Dramatic brass chord resolving from tension to triumph, longer than normal victory — the relief of a hard-won boss fight. Weight lifting, tension releasing, a single held triumphant note. 8 seconds.

stinger_quest_complete.style: JRPG stinger, quest complete, warm chime, satisfied, short, 4 seconds
stinger_quest_complete.prompt: Quest complete jingle. Warm satisfying chime progression — three ascending notes resolving on a fourth. The feeling of checking something off. Brief, clean, earned. 4 seconds.

stinger_save_point.style: JRPG stinger, save point, gentle chime, reassuring, 3 seconds
stinger_save_point.prompt: Save point activation sound. Gentle reassuring chime with a soft shimmer — the comfort of knowing your progress is preserved. Warm, brief, safe. 3 seconds.

dungeon_dragon_fire.style: SNES dungeon, volcanic, deep rumbling bass, smoldering strings, oppressive heat, minor key, 95 BPM
dungeon_dragon_fire.prompt: Volcanic dragon cave dungeon theme. Deep rumbling bass like magma flowing beneath stone, smoldering string tremolo, oppressive heat in every note. Flickering fire crackle percussion, ominous brass swells. The deeper you go the hotter it gets. SNES-era dungeon atmosphere, tense and foreboding. Looping.

dungeon_dragon_ice.style: SNES dungeon, icy, crystalline chimes, cold wind, sparse piano, haunting, 80 BPM
dungeon_dragon_ice.prompt: Frozen dragon cave dungeon theme. Crystalline chime arpeggios echoing off ice walls, cold wind howling through chambers, sparse piano notes that ring and fade in frozen air. Everything is brittle and vast. The cold slows everything down including the music. SNES-era haunting ice dungeon. Looping.

dungeon_suburban.style: EarthBound dungeon, suburban underground, muffled bass, wrong muzak, pipes dripping, unsettling, 90 BPM
dungeon_suburban.prompt: Suburban sewer/basement dungeon theme. Muffled bass through concrete walls, distorted fragments of cheerful muzak leaking down from above, water dripping from pipes. The wrongness of being underneath normalcy. Something is humming down here that shouldn't be. EarthBound underground atmosphere, uncanny and unsettling. Looping.

dungeon_steampunk.style: Steampunk dungeon, massive gears, clockwork rhythm, brass resonance, steam pressure, tense, 100 BPM
dungeon_steampunk.prompt: Interior of a massive clockwork mechanism dungeon theme. Enormous gears turning as rhythm, brass pipes resonating with each rotation, steam pressure building and releasing. The sound of being inside a machine that is larger than you can see. Tense clockwork precision, everything measured and ticking. Steampunk dungeon atmosphere. Looping.

dungeon_industrial.style: Industrial dungeon, factory basement, crushing machinery, dark drone, conveyor rhythm, oppressive, 85 BPM
dungeon_industrial.prompt: Deep factory floor dungeon theme. Crushing machinery percussion in the distance, dark oppressive drone, conveyor belt rhythm that never stops. Fluorescent buzz and metallic echoes. The lowest level of the assembly line where maintenance never reaches. Industrial dungeon, dehumanizing and relentless. Looping.

dungeon_digital.style: Digital dungeon, deep code, corrupted chiptune, data corruption, glitch static, tense electronic, 110 BPM
dungeon_digital.prompt: Deep inside the system's root directory dungeon theme. Corrupted chiptune melody that glitches and stutters, data corruption static, tense electronic pulses like heartbeats of dying processes. The code down here is old and unstable. Digital dungeon, cyberpunk tension, the feeling of exploring code that was never meant to be accessed. Looping.

dungeon_abstract.style: Abstract dungeon, liminal, reverse reverb, near-silence, vast empty drone, existential, 60 BPM
dungeon_abstract.prompt: Abstract void dungeon theme. The space between concepts — reverse reverb tails, vast empty drone, sounds that seem to come from impossible distances. Near-silence that is somehow louder than noise. Liminal space music, the dungeon of ideas where nothing is solid. Existential exploration at the edge of meaning. Looping.

job_fighter_special.style: JRPG special attack, aggressive sword strike, driving drums, heroic brass, short, 8 seconds
job_fighter_special.prompt: Fighter special attack stinger. Aggressive driving drums building to a massive sword strike hit, heroic brass fanfare on impact. Raw physical power unleashed. Short, impactful, the sound of steel meeting everything. 8 seconds.

job_cleric_special.style: JRPG special attack, holy choir, ascending light, warm radiance, healing shimmer, short, 8 seconds
job_cleric_special.prompt: Cleric special attack stinger. Holy choir swelling upward, warm radiant light in sound, healing shimmer cascading outward. Divine power channeled through prayer. Bright, pure, overwhelming warmth. 8 seconds.

job_mage_special.style: JRPG special attack, magical explosion, crackling energy, dramatic orchestral hit, arcane power, short, 8 seconds
job_mage_special.prompt: Mage special attack stinger. Magical energy crackling and building to a massive arcane explosion — dramatic orchestral hit with magical shimmer aftermath. Raw elemental power unleashed through intellect. 8 seconds.

job_rogue_special.style: JRPG special attack, quick slash, stealthy approach, sudden violence, sharp percussion, short, 6 seconds
job_rogue_special.prompt: Rogue special attack stinger. Silence — then a blindingly fast slash. Sharp percussion hit, the whisper of a blade that was already past you before you heard it. Lethal precision, no wasted motion. 6 seconds.

job_bard_special.style: JRPG special attack, musical crescendo, instrument swell, party buff fanfare, inspiring, short, 10 seconds
job_bard_special.prompt: Bard special attack stinger. A musical performance building from a single note to a full ensemble crescendo — every instrument joining in. The party is inspired, buffs stack, morale surges. The power of music as a weapon. 10 seconds.

job_guardian_special.style: JRPG special attack, massive impact absorb, deep bass shield, stone wall percussion, immovable, short, 8 seconds
job_guardian_special.prompt: Guardian special attack stinger. Massive deep bass impact absorbed by an immovable shield — stone wall percussion, the sound of an unstoppable force meeting an immovable object. The object wins. 8 seconds.

job_ninja_special.style: JRPG special attack, rapid multi-hit, wind slash, afterimage, blinding speed, short, 6 seconds
job_ninja_special.prompt: Ninja special attack stinger. Rapid-fire multi-hit slashes so fast they overlap — wind cutting, afterimage whooshes, then silence. The attack was over before it started. Blinding speed compressed into 6 seconds.

job_summoner_special.style: JRPG special attack, dimensional rift, deep horn call, otherworldly arrival, massive presence, short, 10 seconds
job_summoner_special.prompt: Summoner special attack stinger. A deep horn call opens a dimensional rift — otherworldly sounds flood in, something MASSIVE arrives. The ground shakes, reality bends, a being of enormous power is here. 10 seconds.

job_speculator_special.style: JRPG special attack, casino dice roll, slot machine, high risk jackpot, dramatic tension to payout, short, 8 seconds
job_speculator_special.prompt: Speculator special attack stinger. Casino tension — dice rolling, slot machine spinning, dramatic pause — then either JACKPOT explosion of coins and fanfare, or the sound of going bust. High risk high reward in 8 seconds.

job_scriptweaver_special.style: JRPG special attack, code compilation, keyboard rapid fire, system override, reality glitch, short, 8 seconds
job_scriptweaver_special.prompt: Scriptweaver special attack stinger. Rapid keyboard typing building to a system override — reality glitches, damage formulas rewrite themselves, the rules of the game bend audibly. Code compilation sounds becoming music. 8 seconds.

job_time_mage_special.style: JRPG special attack, time reversal, reverse audio, clock unwinding, temporal distortion, short, 8 seconds
job_time_mage_special.prompt: Time Mage special attack stinger. Time reverses — sounds play backward, a clock unwinds, reality stutters and rewinds. The moment before the attack becomes the moment after. Temporal distortion made audible. 8 seconds.

job_necromancer_special.style: JRPG special attack, dark resurrection, grave rumble, ghostly choir, death magic, ominous, short, 8 seconds
job_necromancer_special.prompt: Necromancer special attack stinger. The ground cracks open — grave rumble, ghostly choir rising from below, dark energy crackling. Something dead is being called back. Ominous, powerful, the line between life and death bent. 8 seconds.

job_bossbinder_special.style: JRPG special attack, dominance assertion, chains rattling, boss corruption, power seizure, dramatic, short, 10 seconds
job_bossbinder_special.prompt: Bossbinder special attack stinger. Chains of binding rattling into place, a boss-tier power being seized and redirected. The sound of taking control of something that should not be controlled. Dramatic, dangerous, the corruption spreading. 10 seconds.

job_skiptrotter_special.style: JRPG special attack, dimensional warp, VHS fast-forward, reality skip, instant teleport, short, 5 seconds
job_skiptrotter_special.prompt: Skiptrotter special attack stinger. VHS fast-forward sound — reality skips ahead, frames drop, the space between here and there just disappears. Instant warp. The shortest stinger in the game because the Skiptrotter doesn't waste time. 5 seconds.

shop.style: 16-bit SNES shop theme, cozy, gentle piano and harp, light woodwinds, pizzicato strings, warm, welcoming, medium tempo, loopable
shop.prompt: Cozy JRPG merchant's shop, warm interior with hanging lanterns, shelves of potions and gear, welcoming shopkeeper behind a wooden counter. Gentle piano arpeggios over soft harp, light flute melody drifting above, pizzicato strings underneath. Calm and inviting, lets the player browse without pressure, classic FF/Dragon Quest shop-music feel. Loops cleanly.

village_harmonia.style: 16-bit SNES pastoral folk, gentle lute, pan flute, hand drum, village festival warmth, hopeful, 100 BPM
village_harmonia.prompt: The starter village where every adventure begins. Rolling green hills, cobblestone paths, smoke rising from chimneys, children chasing chickens. Gentle lute plucking a simple folk melody, pan flute answering overhead, soft hand drum keeping time. Warm, pastoral, earnest — the feeling of a hero's first step out the front door. Loopable.

village_scriptura.style: 16-bit SNES regal court music, harpsichord, pipe organ swell, choral pads, orchestral strings, stately, 90 BPM
village_scriptura.prompt: The capital city of Scriptura. Home to the Scriptweaver's Guild — scholars in long robes, towering bookcases, stained glass casting colored light on marble floors. Harpsichord leads a dignified melody, pipe organ adds gravity on the low end, soft choral pads give it cathedral reverb, orchestral strings soar on the chorus. Regal, intellectual, ancient authority. Loopable.

village_maple_heights.style: EarthBound lo-fi suburban, detuned music box, sitcom plucks, ice cream truck melody warped, gentle synth pad, slightly off-key, 95 BPM
village_maple_heights.prompt: A quiet suburban neighborhood where every lawn is too green and every smile too wide. Picket fences, waving mail carriers, kids on bikes who never age. Detuned music box leads a sitcom-ready theme, rubber-band plucked bass, distant ice cream truck melody warped just slightly out of tune, gentle synth pad underneath. Warm and nostalgic with the unmistakable undertone that something is wrong. EarthBound meets Twin Peaks. Loopable.

village_brasston.style: steampunk clockwork waltz, 3/4 time, brass ensemble, ticking percussion, metronome clicks, harpsichord runs, precise, 120 BPM
village_brasston.prompt: The clockwork market town of Brasston, where brass is currency and every citizen runs on schedule. A waltz in 3/4 time, locked perfectly to a metronome click. Brass ensemble carries the melody, harpsichord fills between beats with mechanical runs, ticking percussion layered like gears meshing. Precise, punctual, slightly obsessive. The feeling of a town where being late is illegal. Loopable.

village_rivet_row.style: industrial blues, lonesome harmonica, slide guitar, factory drone undertone, shuffle drums, minor key, 80 BPM
village_rivet_row.prompt: A workers' settlement on the factory outskirts. Rivet Row. The company provides everything, the company owns everything. Lonesome harmonica leads a blues melody, slide guitar answers, shuffle drums keep a slow shift-change tempo, a low factory drone never quite stops in the background. Minor key. Tired, worn, defiant. The feeling of the last hour of a double shift. Loopable.

village_node_prime.style: digital lounge, synthwave rest stop, lofi drums, glowing pads, chiptune bells, modem hum, 95 BPM
village_node_prime.prompt: A digital rest stop in the network where data flows like water and programs walk like people. Node Prime. Synthwave chords pulse slowly, lofi drums hold a chill groove, chiptune bells ring in the top end, a warm modem hum anchors the low. Glowing, welcoming, the feeling of a safe zone between scary routes. Loopable.

village_vertex.style: minimalist ambient, single piano notes, long silences, slow breath pad, sub-bass drone, 60 BPM, sparse
village_vertex.prompt: The Vertex. A point of convergence in the void. Simple. Quiet. Almost nothing. One piano note. A long silence. Another piano note. A slow breath pad drifts underneath, a sub-bass drone barely there. No melody. No rhythm. Just presence. The last shopkeeper. A traveler. Someone. Brian Eno writing an end-credits theme for the end of all worlds. Loopable.
